message:
fix: Closure append analysis for scoped variables

Extended the closure append type inference (eighth pass) to also process
scoped_var_types, not just global var_types. This enables inferring
element types for empty lists that are captured and mutated by nested
functions inside other functions.

Before: Only module-level lists had their element types inferred from
closure appends

After: Function-local lists also get element type inference from closure
appends

This fixes the first part of the closure captured list type inference
issue in dictcomps test.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
